title: crotalaria ramosissima
intro: Crotalaria ramosissima, also known as the broom rattlebox or ramosissima crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off parasites. The health benefits of Crotalaria ramosissima include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it has been used in folk medicine to treat snake bites and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria ramosissima can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
